TemplatesPage.title: Choose Your Template
TemplatesPage.description: Select a professional template that best represents your style and industry. You can preview how your resume will look and change templates later.
TemplatesPage.helpText: Don't worry! You can change your template at any time during the creation process.

AboutForm.title: Professional Summary
AboutForm.description: Write a brief summary that highlights your key achievements and career goals

aboutMe.label: Professional Summary
aboutMe.placeholder: I am a passionate software engineer with 5+ years of experience in full-stack development. I specialize in building scalable web applications using modern technologies and frameworks. My goal is to create innovative solutions that drive business growth and enhance user experiences.
aboutMe.helpText: Keep it concise and highlight your most relevant skills and achievements (2-3 sentences recommended)

github.label: GitHub Profile
github.helpText: Include your full GitHub profile URL to showcase your projects and contributions
github.validation: Please enter a valid GitHub URL (must contain github.com) or leave empty

linkedin.label: LinkedIn Profile
linkedin.helpText: Include your full LinkedIn profile URL to connect with potential employers
linkedin.validation: Please enter a valid LinkedIn URL (must contain linkedin.com) or leave empty
